title: Design mesh/state coordination branch and worktree topology
description: Define how Agent Mesh creates, discovers, and uses a dedicated coordination worktree on the mesh/state branch while keeping the shared root on main.
acceptance_criteria: Specify how mesh/state is created and located from any worktree
Define the expected shared root, coordination worktree, and task worktree topology
Document initialization and recovery behavior when the coordination worktree is missing or stale
